detail:
Server error: HTTPDriver for http://localhost:8123 received ClickHouse error code 60
 Code: 60. DB::Exception: Unknown table expression identifier 'hl_spot_tokens' in scope SELECT token_index, token_id, name, sz_decimals, wei_decimals, is_canonical, evm_address, evm_extra_wei_decimals, updated_at FROM hl_spot_tokens ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 0, 200. (UNKNOWN_TABLE) (version 25.8.2.29 (official build))
